title: [kimi-review] 1d4545c: [SEVERITY: high] Commit message/diff mismatch: the message c
description:
Commit: 1d4545c15
Message: fix(kconfig): resolve codereview for RPL/SCHC/L2 callback, now_ms, PoE, T-Deck LVGL, board Kconfig

Finding: [SEVERITY: high] Commit message/diff mismatch: the message claims to resolve code review findings for "RPL/SCHC/L2 callback, now_ms, PoE, T-Deck LVGL, board Kconfig," but the diff contains none of those changes — only a one-line comment edit in `spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md`. Either the actual fixes were omitted from this commit or the message is stale/copy-pasted. As-is, the claimed code review resolutions are unverifiable and likely missing.
